title: helenium csatoi
intro: Helenium csatoi, also known as the Sneezeweed, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce perspiration and serve as a diaphoretic, making it a natural remedy for fever and colds. The Sneezeweed has been used to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a decoction, often combined with other herbs, to create teas and infusions for its medicinal purposes.
